title: Bean Counting 2.0
section: 📝 The Art of Data Brewing: From Seed to Sip
text:
📝 The Art of Data Brewing: From Seed to Sip

In the world of specialty coffee, moving from a raw seed to a perfect cup requires precision, grading, and constant monitoring. Similarly, our project treats raw banking data as “green beans,” applying visual analytics and machine learning to refine them into actionable business insights.




🌿

Harvesting Insight


Analysing Spending Behaviours



Just as harvesting ripe cherries is the foundation of quality, understanding transaction frequency and volume serves as our “origin” data. We identify core behaviors that drive stability and uncover raw potential.




⚖️

Grading the Roast


Comparing Occupations



Green beans must be meticulously graded. We treat “Occupation” as a critical grading metric, comparing engagement across diverse backgrounds to identify “premium segments.”




☕

The Final Cupping


Churn Probability Prediction



Predicting churn is like cupping for defects. Using predictive modeling, we act as a quality control layer, providing early warnings to ensure customer relationships remain bold.
